title: Document the timeout parameter more thoroughly in the Quickstart
body: The `timeout` argument is only briefly mentioned. New users repeatedly hit hangs because they don't set it. We should explain connect vs read timeouts and recommend always passing one.

_comments.body: Agreed. The advanced docs cover it but the Quickstart should at least link there.

title: SSLError raised even when verify=False is passed
body: On a corporate proxy, `requests.get(url, verify=False)` still raises SSLError intermittently. Expected verify=False to fully disable certificate verification.

_comments.body: Can you share the full traceback and your urllib3 version?
urllib3 2.2.1. Traceback points into adapters.py send().

title: Certificate verification fails with custom CA bundle on Windows
body: Setting REQUESTS_CA_BUNDLE to a custom path is ignored on Windows when the path contains spaces.

title: Connection pool exhausted under high concurrency
body: When firing hundreds of concurrent requests through a single Session, we see 'connection pool is full' warnings and dropped connections. The HTTPAdapter pool_maxsize default of 10 is too low and hard to discover.

_comments.body: You can raise pool_maxsize by mounting a custom HTTPAdapter. We should document this pattern better.
That works, but the default and the warning message could be friendlier.

title: Add type hints to requests.api module
body: requests/api.py still lacks complete type annotations. This is a self-contained, beginner-friendly change.

title: requests hangs indefinitely when server stops responding mid-body
body: Even with a read timeout set, streaming a large response can hang if the server stalls between chunks. The timeout only seems to apply to the initial read.

_comments.body: This is a known urllib3 interaction. The per-read timeout should still fire — needs investigation in adapters.py.

title: Typo in advanced documentation: 'recieve'
body: docs/user/advanced.rst spells 'receive' as 'recieve' in two places.

title: Proxy environment variables ignored when session.trust_env is True
body: HTTPS_PROXY is not picked up in some shells even though trust_env defaults to True.

_comments.body: Likely a casing issue with the env var. Which OS?

title: Feature request: expose retry configuration on Session directly
body: Configuring retries currently requires building a urllib3 Retry and mounting an adapter. A Session-level shortcut would help.

title: Cookies not persisted across redirects to a different subdomain
body: A Set-Cookie on the first response is dropped when the redirect target is a sibling subdomain, even though the cookie domain allows it.

title: Improve error message for invalid URL schemes
body: Passing 'htp://example.com' raises a generic InvalidSchema error. The message could suggest the likely intended scheme.

title: Memory usage grows when reusing a Session for many requests
body: Long-lived Session objects appear to retain references to response content. Possibly the cookie jar or the adapter pool.

_comments.body: Can you confirm whether you're holding references to Response objects yourself?

title: Question: how to stream upload a large file?
body: Is there a recommended way to stream a multi-GB file upload without loading it into memory?

_comments.body: Pass a file object or generator as `data=`. Closing as answered.

title: HTTPError not raised for 4xx when stream=True
body: raise_for_status() works, but I expected an automatic error. Turns out that's by design.

_comments.body: Working as intended — raise_for_status() is opt-in. Closing.

title: Digest auth fails against servers that omit the qop directive
body: HTTPDigestAuth in requests/auth.py assumes qop is present. Some legacy servers omit it and authentication fails.

title: Encoding detection picks wrong charset for some JSON responses
body: Response.text mis-decodes a UTF-8 JSON body as ISO-8859-1 when the server omits a charset in Content-Type.

_comments.body: This is the documented fallback behaviour — use response.json() or set response.encoding explicitly.

title: Add a changelog entry for the 2.32 connection reuse fix
body: HISTORY.md is missing the connection-reuse fix from the last release.

title: Session.resolve_redirects drops the body on 307 redirects in rare cases
body: A 307 should preserve method and body. In a chained-redirect scenario the rebuilt request in sessions.py loses the body.

title: Feature request: per-request logging hook
body: A built-in hook to log every request/response without monkeypatching would be useful.

title: Update copyright year in docs
body: docs/conf.py still shows last year.

title: Fix per-read timeout not firing on stalled streaming responses
body:
Addresses #6778. Threads the read timeout through each chunk read in HTTPAdapter.send so a mid-body stall raises ReadTimeout.

- Pass timeout into the urllib3 read loop
- Add a regression test in tests/test_adapters.py

_comments.body: Nice. Please also cover the chunked-encoding path.

_files.patch:
@@ def send(self, request, stream=False, timeout=None ...
-        resp = conn.urlopen(...)
+        resp = conn.urlopen(..., timeout=timeout)
+        # propagate read timeout per chunk

title: Raise pool_maxsize default and improve the 'pool is full' warning
body: Addresses #6788. Bumps the default pool_maxsize on HTTPAdapter and rewrites the warning to point users at mounting a custom adapter.

_comments.body: Let's keep the default but make the warning actionable — changing the default is a behaviour change.

_files.patch:
@@ class HTTPAdapter ...
-    DEFAULT_POOLSIZE = 10
+    DEFAULT_POOLSIZE = 10  # see warning below
+    # clearer warning message

title: Docs: add a Quickstart section on timeouts
body: Addresses #6801. Adds a 'Timeouts' subsection to docs/user/quickstart.rst explaining connect vs read timeouts.

title: Handle missing qop directive in HTTPDigestAuth
body: Addresses #6695. Makes requests/auth.py tolerate servers that omit qop in the WWW-Authenticate header.

_comments.body: Please add a test against a fixture server without qop.

_files.patch:
@@ class HTTPDigestAuth ...
-        qop = self._thread_local.chal['qop']
+        qop = self._thread_local.chal.get('qop')

title: Add type hints to requests.api
body: Addresses #6782. Annotates all public functions in src/requests/api.py.

_files.patch:
@@ def get(url, params=None, **kwargs):
-def get(url, params=None, **kwargs):
+def get(url: str, params=None, **kwargs) -> Response:

title: Preserve request body across 307/308 redirect chains
body: Addresses #6660. Fixes Session.resolve_redirects in sessions.py to keep the body on 307/308.

_files.patch:
@@ def resolve_redirects ...
+        if response.status_code in (307, 308):
+            prepared_request.body = req.body
